goal: Prepare one approval-gated revenue action for the human overseer.

opportunity.title: Show HN: Feuxo – Real-Time hiring posts + contacts + AI personalized outreach
opportunity.summary: Hi HN, I built Feuxo to help freelancers and job seeker finds real-time active opportunities outside traditional job boards. It scans public posts where people explicitly say they’re looking for specific skills (e.g., “need a developer”, “looking for digital marketer”), and surfaces: - The original live post link - Contact information when available - AI-generated personalized outreach / cover letter you can use quickly I started by doing this manually for people replying to my posts, and in the

constraints: Human must approve and send the final message.
